## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena to discuss content strategy, SEO improvements, and performance metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content strategy focusing on brand communities and real-life examples](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Implemented fact-checking step in content workflow for improved quality](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues still present; considering test with new CMS setup](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Team aims to ramp up content production and publishing frequency](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Topics

### Brand Community Content Strategy

  - [Shift towards creating content about brand communities (e.g., Harley-Davidson, Starbucks)](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Implement account-based marketing SEO approach](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Create articles about specific brands to open conversations with potential clients](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [Incorporate more real-life examples and customer stories in content](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)

### Content Workflow Improvements

  - [Launched V2 version of content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [Added fact-checking step for improved accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Utilizing Arena's help center and docs as source of truth](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [New strategy allows for more focused, less repetitive content](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=895.0)

### SEO Performance and Metrics

  - [Seeing improvements in clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [92 published articles, 3 currently indexed](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [6 articles in drafts, 10 more due this week](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=911.0)
  - [30 refreshed articles in total (20 done, 10 more by end of week)](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)

### Technical SEO Concerns

  - [Considering test with new CMS setup (e.g., WordPress) for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Proposal to create a subdomain with 10 test pages to compare indexing performance](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Team to evaluate feasibility of implementing new CMS for blog only](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

### Content Production Plans

  - [Aim to increase content production and publishing frequency](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Focus on new topics like Black Friday and YouTube communities](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [Plan to capitalize on upcoming seasonal trends](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to deliver Harley-Davidson community article by Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Paola to review newly added content topics](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [Team to prepare comparison of Arena's growth vs. best/average GrowthX customers](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Paulo to discuss potential CMS test implementation with Luis](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Jimmy to provide reports comparing Arena's performance to other clients](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Continue ramping up content production and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=1166.0)
  - [Monitor performance of refreshed articles in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/yQpMZneCQ9R5REzqahCyfyEbz78_z1GG?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
